name: bitget-guardpilot-workspace
description: Root workspace launcher for the GuardPilot Bitget hackathon project.

scripts.dev:api: cd guardpilot && PYTHONPATH=apps/api python3 -m uvicorn guardpilot.main:app --app-dir apps/api --reload --port 8000
scripts.test: cd guardpilot && PYTHONPATH=apps/api python3 -m pytest apps/api/guardpilot/tests
